cases.name: pg_index_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_index

cases.name: pg_index_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT indexrelid, indrelid, indnatts, indnkeyatts, indisunique, indisprimary, indkey FROM pg_index ORDER BY indexrelid

cases.name: pg_index_test-3
cases.sql:
SELECT
            ic.relname as index_name,
            i.indnatts,
            i.indkey
        FROM pg_index i
        JOIN pg_class ic ON i.indexrelid = ic.oid
        JOIN pg_class tc ON i.indrelid = tc.oid
        WHERE tc.relname = 'products' AND i.indnatts > 1
        ORDER BY ic.relname
